message:
chore(ci): refresh CI gate reports, conformance timestamps, and update beads tracker

- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated investigation results for bd-1rglr
  (model cycling scope verification), new phase-3 task status updates
- tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/: regenerated platform events
  and report with current timestamps
- tests/ext_conformance/reports/: refreshed conformance report and
  summary timestamps
- tests/full_suite_gate/: refreshed all gate artifacts — certification
  events, reports, verdicts, preflight, and waiver audit timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
